title: ReforgedPlayVoiceChat
description: This is a mod that makes u use simple voice chat on reforgedplay
body:
# Nexus Replay Voice Chat

Client-side compatibility bridge between **Simple Voice Chat** and **ReForgedPlay Mod** on **NeoForge**.

This mod records voice chat audio into replay data and plays it back during replay viewing/rendering.

## Features

- Records incoming and outgoing Simple Voice Chat audio into replay files
- Supports entity, locational, and static/group voice packets
- Replays voice audio during replay playback
- Integrates voice audio into replay rendering/export flow
- Client-only mod (no server install required)

## Requirements

- Minecraft `1.21.1`
- NeoForge `21.1.x`
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) (NeoForge)
- ReForgedPlay Mod (`0.3+`)
- Java `21`

## Installation

1. Install NeoForge for Minecraft `1.21.1`
2. Put the following jars into your client `mods` folder:
   - `nexusreplayvoicechat-...jar`
   - Simple Voice Chat (NeoForge)
   - ReForgedPlay Mod
3. Launch the game

## Usage

1. Join a server and use voice chat normally
2. Start replay recording (ReForgedPlay/Replay workflow)
3. Voice packets are stored in the replay
4. Open the replay to hear recorded voice
5. Render/export replay with integrated voice audio

## Compatibility Notes

- This mod is client-side and uses optional custom payload channels for compatibility with servers that do not have this mod installed.
- Voice behavior depends on Simple Voice Chat availability and connection state.

## Important Migration Note

Recent versions use the mod id namespace `nexusreplayvoicechat`.

If you previously recorded replays with older builds using the old namespace, those recordings may not include compatible voice payload identifiers without migration.

## Known Limitations

- Very slow/very fast replay speed may affect voice quality (pitch/rate handling)
- This project does not add server-side voice features; it bridges replay recording/playback

## License

MIT

## Credits

- NEXUS (author)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)
- ReForgedPlay / Replay ecosystem contributors
